name: debugcontext-monorepo
description: DebugContext monorepo - Zero-configuration debugging SDK for Node.js

scripts.release:patch: standard-version --release-as patch && git push --follow-tags && npm publish
scripts.release:minor: standard-version --release-as minor && git push --follow-tags && npm publish
scripts.release:major: standard-version --release-as major && git push --follow-tags && npm publish

author: DebugContext Contributors
